_publications._publicationTitle: Perspectives of adolescents with neurofibromatosis 1 and cutaneous neurofibromas: Implications for clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: treatment modality agreement among adolescent-caregiver pairs was poor to moderate, with kappa values ranging from .15 to .51
details: Enabled measurement of adolescent and caregiver perspectives on cNF impact and treatment preferences, with agreement analysis using kappa values ranging from 0.15 to 1.0
